sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60881" key="kunodhktiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠνο-δηκτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n60881.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for dog-bite</tr_>, [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔμπλαστρος</foreign>] Theodor. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:4:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
